# Schedule {#schedule}

| **Day 1**                |
|----------------------------------|
| Welcome and Housekeeping         |
| Log in to VM                     |
| Background on ScRNAseq + R tools |
| Load data                        |
| QC filtering                     |
| **Break**                        |
| Normalisation                    |
| PCAs and UMAPs                   |


| **Day 2**            |
|------------------------------|
| Integration                  |
| Clustering                   |
| Cluster Markers              |
| **Break**                    |
| SingleR                      |
| Differential Expression      |
| Final remarks and conclusion |
